description_long: This is a white ceramic cup featuring vibrant, full-color artwork from the Dragon Ball anime series. The exterior is adorned with dynamic illustrations of several characters, including a prominent figure in an orange gi and others in various action poses, set against a background of swirling energy effects. The cup has a classic cylindrical shape with a smoothly curved handle attached to one side, providing a comfortable grip. The artwork wraps around the cup, creating a continuous, visually engaging scene from every angle. The interior of the cup is plain white, contrasting with the colorful exterior. The surface appears glossy, reflecting light and enhancing the vividness of the printed design.
description: A white ceramic cup with a glossy finish, decorated with colorful Dragon Ball anime artwork wrapping around its exterior and a plain white interior.
description_view_0: This view highlights the front of the cup, showcasing a large illustration of a character in an orange gi and part of the swirling background artwork.
description_view_1: The handle is fully visible in this view, with more characters and energy effects from the artwork wrapping around the side.
description_view_2: This angle shows additional characters and the continuation of the dynamic artwork, with the handle on the left side.
description_view_3: A close-up of the main character in the orange gi is visible, emphasizing the action pose and vivid colors of the design.
